emails.subject: Benefits Issues
emails.body: Benefits Issues Peter, I work with Jeanie and she filled me in on your good news . congratulations. I know that this must be a very exciting time in your life. I am going to forward you a form via interoffice mail that you will need to fill out after you legally adopt your new child. Please forward this completed form along with the adoption papers to me at EB3667A, and I will turn them in for you. If you have any additional questions, please let me know and I will be more than happy to assist you. Thanks, and congratulations again. Anne Labbe'

emails.subject: Re: Benefits Issues
emails.body: Re: Benefits Issues Thanks for the note. Will I be able to cover the child from the time when we get leal custody? There will be a time lag possibly up to a year until the adoption will be final Thanks you, Pete

emails.subject: Re: Benefits Issues
emails.body: Yes you will. I sent the form to you via interoffice to you today, so if you do not receive it by Monday, please let me know. Thanks, Anne Peter F Keavey@ECT 11/10/2000 12:27 PM
